note: Real tick-level microstructure data for USDC/USDT DEX pools during SVB bank run, March 2023. This is the primary test set for all cross-mechanism transfer experiments.

Real L2 order book data for Terra/LUNA 2022 is not available in this dataset. The synthetic generator preserves: (1) oracle_net_bps distribution derived from committed benchmark statistics; (2) signal-to-noise ratio consistent with the Terra depeg timeline; (3) class imbalance matching the real SVB reference dataset.
No real L2 Celsius/3AC order book data in dataset. Generator calibrated to preserve cross-mechanism transfer statistics.
No real L2 FTX order book data in dataset. Generator calibrated to preserve cross-mechanism transfer statistics.

BUSD is intentionally excluded from the transfer matrix. Its depeg was driven by a regulatory order (SEC enforcement action), not a market panic or de-anchoring event. This mechanism is categorically different (policy shock vs. run dynamic), so including it would conflate distinct DeFi stress mechanisms. The transfer matrix focuses on panic-driven de-pegging: Terra, Celsius/3AC, FTX, SVB.
Null-distribution control: Gaussian noise with mean=0, std calibrated to calm market spreads. Used to verify that cross-mechanism transfer only fires on genuine stress events.
